'''Meetra Surik's armband''' was a personal armband of [[Meetra Surik]], a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knight]] who was also known as the Jedi Exile. It was left by [[Gender/Legends|her]] in her quarters on the [[Harbinger (Hammerhead-class)|''Harbinger'']] and relocated when the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] docked on the [[Peragus II]] [[Mining/Legends|Mining]] [[Peragus Mining Facility|Station]]. [[Red]] in [[Color/Legends|color]], it provided an increase to her improved health and resiliency.

==Description==
[[Meetra Surik]]'s armband appeared [[red]], while providing more health and resiliency to the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. It was similar to many other armbands of the era in its appearance, and it could be worn on either arm. Unique in construction, it was usable only by Surik.<ref name="kotor2" />

==History==
[[File:Surik-armband-room.png|thumb|right|250px|Surik's living quarters and locker on the ''Harbinger'']]
In [[3951 BBY]], at the height of the [[Dark Wars]],<ref name="kotorcg" /> [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] Meetra Surik returned to [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] space after [[Gender/Legends|her]] [[Exile (punishment)/Legends|exile]] to the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] for defying the [[Jedi Council]]'s wishes during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. She was taken as a passenger on the Republic [[Hammerhead-class cruiser|''Hammerhead''-class]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] [[Harbinger (Hammerhead-class)|''Harbinger'']], with her armband among the possessions she kept in her cabin aboard the [[Starship/Legends|ship]]. When [[Sith assassin/Legends|Sith assassins]] led by [[Darth Sion]] infiltrated the [[Starship/Legends|starship]], Meetra Surik was evacuated to a small [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], the ''[[Ebon Hawk]]'', and escaped without her belongings. During the escape, ''Ebon Hawk'' was damaged by [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] fire, and it barely managed to make an emergency jump to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] before it ended up drifting and consequently harboring in a [[Peragus Mining Facility|mining facility]] on [[Peragus II|one]] of the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] of the [[Peragus asteroid field]].<ref name="kotor2" />

{{Gamemechanics}}
When the ''Harbinger'' docked to the mining facility in pursuit of the Jedi, Surik and her new companions used the ship as an escape route. While going through the now Sith-controlled cruiser, Surik recovered her armband from the cabin she occupied while being a passenger on the ship.<ref name="kotor2" />
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
Meetra Surik's armband was created for [[Obsidian Entertainment]]'s [[2004]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''.<ref name="kotor2" /> In the game, the Jedi Exile is named according to the player's choosing, and the armband gains the name accordingly. In the Xbox version of the game, the armband is called "''Jedi Exile's armband''" while in the PC-version it's referred to as "''Jedi Exile's band''" or "''Jedi Exile's armband''."<ref name="KotOR IIc">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' dialogue file, StrRef 125630, 125687, 126926: "''{c01}<FullName>'s Band''"</ref> This article uses the more comprehensive naming of the two.<ref name="kotor2" /> In the [[2011]] novel ''[[The Old Republic: Revan]]'', the name of the Jedi Exile was confirmed to be Meetra Surik.<ref name="revan" /> The band provides +1 to the constitution attribute of the playable character, which affects maximum health and resiliency in the game.<ref name="kotor2" />
